query:
SELECT 
  leadId, 
  DATE(dataAgendamento) as data, 
  horaAgendamento, 
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM agendamentos
GROUP BY leadId, DATE(dataAgendamento), horaAgendamento
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
